market_context: Markets face headwinds from escalating U.S.-Iran tensions as Trump rejects latest proposal, driving oil prices up 2-3%. Futures are slightly negative despite recent six-week rally in major indices. Tomorrow's CPI report expected to show elevated inflation.

predictions.reasoning: Rising oil prices from Iran conflict rejection and negative futures suggest market digestion after six-week rally. VIX at 18.24 shows building uncertainty ahead of Tuesday's CPI report which could show 3.8% annual inflation.

Preliminary Apple chip deal momentum continues with premarket gains. Stock hit all-time high of $130.57 Friday and has surged 240% YTD. Strong foundry validation from Apple partnership should drive further institutional buying.

Hantavirus vaccine development news drove 7.5% premarket spike as outbreak concerns persist from cruise ship incident. mRNA platform validation for rare diseases supports pipeline diversification story beyond COVID revenues.

WTI crude up 2.59% to $97.89 on Iran conflict escalation after Trump rejects proposal. Energy sector should benefit from sustained higher oil prices with Strait of Hormuz tensions unresolved and limited supply alternatives.
